Armies of Exigo
DeveloperBlack Hole Entertainment
PublisherCinergi Interactive
ComposerJeremy Soule
PlatformMicrosoft Windows
ReleaseNA: November 30, 2004
GenreReal-time strategy
ModesSingle-player, multiplayer

Armies of Exigo is a real-time strategy video game developed by Black Hole Entertainment.
